title: ACE, Higher Education Groups Urge Key Protections in Workforce Pell Rulemaking
summary_en: ACE joined more than 35 higher education associations in submitting comments to the Department of Education urging important revisions to its proposed rules implementing the Workforce Pell Grant program created under the One Big Beautiful Bill Act.
title_cn: [еЊЕзњїиѓС] ACE, Higher Education Groups Urge Key Protections in Workforce Pell Rulemaking

title: Trump Administration Does Not Seek to Appeal to Supreme Court, Indirect Costs Cap Litigation Concluded
summary_en: The Trump administration did not seek to have the Supreme Court take up appeal of the Circuit Court decision, with the Department of Justice not meeting the deadline this month to make such a request.
title_cn: [еЊЕзњїиѓС] Trump Administration Does Not Seek to Appeal to Supreme Court, Indirect Costs Cap Litigation Concluded

title: ACEвАЩs Building Pathways Initiative to Conduct Events Focusing on Cross-Sector Partnerships, State Strategies for Student Success
summary_en: An April 28, in-person convening in Pennsylvania and a May 6 webinar, the next installments in ACEвАЩs Building Pathways Initiative, are open for registration.
title_cn: [еЊЕзњїиѓС] ACEвАЩs Building Pathways Initiative to Conduct Events Focusing on Cross-Sector Partnerships, State Strategies for Student Success
